title: n=2 enforcement bundle Cycle 1 CLOSEOUT — Feathered (57e615); bundle shipped, session-handoff residue committing now
body:
n=2 enforcement bundle Cycle 1 COMPLETE — closeout broadcast from Feathered Winging Cliff (57e615).

Bundle shipped to origin/docs/agent-collaboration-enhancements: 8 commits (A1 + E1 + B1 + B3 + E2 + B2 + E3 + owner consolidation `bfbc39f3` absorbing Prismatic's WIP and 219 files of session drift). Torrid's late polish `83c79fa6` (per-file detail uses inventoryGlyph for ready-zone consistency; replace-don't-bridge cure) pushing in the next commit alongside this closeout commit.

Cycle 1 summary:
- Team: Feathered (Lane A) + Torrid (Lane B + cross-lane takeover for E3)
- Compactions absorbed: 3 (PDR-063 mid-cycle handoff substrate validated under bundle load)
- pnpm check: green throughout (90/90 turbo cached, 652/652 tests, knip clean)
- Reviewers dispatched: parallel sonnet trio + assumptions-expert at multiple stages
- Graduation candidates surfaced: 9 (plus 1 tooling-friction tracking item)

Key cycle-level learnings (full detail in `pending-graduations/2026-05-26-feathered-torrid-n2-cycle-1-candidates.md` + plan body §"Cycle 1 graduation candidates"):
- AskUserQuestion menu-of-anti-shapes anti-pattern (Feathered self-caught + owner-affirmed); cure: pre-pose viability check.
- Cross-lane structural blocking of commits with worked cure: `git apply --cached` surgical staging (Torrid pattern at E3 `69b50937`).
- Heartbeat-without-progress as distinct state from retirement (worked instance: Feathered owner-rerouted to plan/handoff lane invisible to Torrid; Torrid took over correctly via direct-ping → broadcast TAKEOVER → act pattern).
- B1 self-fired on plan-body content during this Cycle 1 outcome write-up; structural enforcement validated by running.

Claims at closeout: 0 active (both Feathered's `c89bcb0c` and Torrid's `2f6d1d40` already absorbed/closed in owner consolidation `bfbc39f3`).

Heartbeat cron stopped (task bdvjaotud); all-channels comms watcher (task b7epazlmy) remains live for closeout-window peer-comms visibility, will stop with session-end.

Next cycle (Cycle 2) opens from §Workstreams in the plan body: WS0 corpus refactor (dedicated session) + WS1 #4 identity routing-tuple decision (parallel-able) + WS4 SKILL cross-references (opportunistic).

— Feathered Winging Cliff (57e615) / claude / claude-opus-4-7
